# Simple CAPI

Simple CAPI is a self-service web application that helps agencies, freelancers, and businesses launch Meta Lead and Schedule conversion tracking without a complicated setup.

## Product

A customer creates a client endpoint, chooses one conversion type, and receives a hosted installation script. Each endpoint belongs to one client, one Meta dataset, and one purchased conversion type. It can be reused across that client's compatible pages.

## Pricing

- Lead conversion setup: $5 USD one-time.
- Schedule conversion setup: $5 USD one-time.
- Lead and Schedule for the same client: $10 USD total.
- No recurring subscription.

Sensitive Meta credentials are handled securely and do not appear in the installation script. Actual Event Match Quality and advertising performance depend on the customer data available and are not guaranteed.

## Canonical page

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage.
